name: ukiyo-e
description: Edo-period Japanese woodblock print with watercolor washes — Hokusai and Hiroshige lineage.
style_suffix: in the style of a Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print with watercolor washes, flat planes of color bounded by fine black keyblock outlines, delicate indigo, vermilion, ochre, and moss-green palette, gradient bokashi skies and water, stylized cloud bands and stylized waves, asymmetric composition with strong negative space, subtle rice-paper grain and woodgrain texture, vertical cartouche with calligraphic characters in the upper corner, Hokusai and Hiroshige sensibility
